Visiual Communication Design

Career Opportunities

MENU

Graduates of the Visual Communication Design Department can develop their careers in the following fields: Photography, Graphic Design, Advertising, Fine Arts, Video, Film, Media and New Media, Publishing, Web Design, and Interactive Design.
